title: Neverbell — 24/7 trading for AI agents
excerpt: Give your AI agent direct market access. Trade stocks, ETFs, commodities and crypto with leverage.
content_html:
24/7 trading
for AI agents

Give your AI agent 24/7 direct market access to trade stocks, ETFs, commodities and crypto with leverage. Longs, shorts, spot. Trade anything. All from a single conversation.

Sign up to receive $1,000 in test funds

and start testing immediately with OpenClaw, Hermes, Claude Code etc.

Receive updates from Neverbell related to your account

Send a message to your agent to trade, check your balance, manage positions, and learn about any asset.

Ask your agent to send you a daily heartbeat with a news feed and sentiment analysis for positions you can act on.

Set up your own personal quant that creates models, gives you advice and reports, and opens and closes trades autonomously.

Connect your agent to a phone service so you can call your broker and execute trades out loud.

✦

Neverbell is an agentic skill that gives your AI agent direct market access. Over 300 assets. Stocks, ETFs, commodities and crypto with full leverage. You control the risk. Chain data sources, build strategies, react to breaking news, run models, build entirely unique trading interfaces. The possibilities are endless.

Watch it in action

Trade what Congress trades. Before the news cycle catches up.

Download

Google "recession" starts trending. Your agent already moved to gold.

Download

Oil tankers rerouting to storage. Your agent sees it. Shorts crude.

Download

Just tell it what you want. It handles the rest.

Download

Breaking news hits Reuters. Your portfolio reacts before you finish reading.

Download

It studies how you trade. Builds a model. Then beats you at your own game.

Download

Frequently asked questions

What is Neverbell?

Neverbell is a skill for AI agents that provides direct market access — allowing agents to monitor markets, interpret natural-language instructions, and help prepare or execute trades through connected trading infrastructure. It is not a standalone app, trading platform, broker, or financial advisor.

How does Neverbell work?

Neverbell connects a supported AI agent to market data and trading execution tools. You provide instructions in natural language — such as what assets to watch, when to alert you, or what trade to prepare. The agent interprets those instructions, checks market conditions, and acts within the permissions and limits you have defined. All decisions remain with the user.

What can I use Neverbell for?

Neverbell enables AI agents to monitor market movements, track specific assets, set trading parameters, and prepare or execute supported trades based on your instructions. Availability depends on supported agents, integrations, and trading venues.

Is Neverbell a trading platform or app?

No. Neverbell is a skill for AI agents, not a standalone trading platform, consumer app, or brokerage. It is designed to work inside supported AI agent environments, giving those agents the ability to interact with market data and trading infrastructure on your behalf, within limits you set.

Which AI agents support Neverbell?

Neverbell is being built for agent environments including Claude Code, OpenClaw, Hermes, and other compatible agent frameworks. Support may expand as the skill develops and additional integrations become available.

Do I need to know how to code to use Neverbell?

Coding knowledge is not required to understand what Neverbell does, but early access is currently best suited for people comfortable using AI agents, terminals, or agent-based workflows. The experience may become more accessible to a broader audience over time.

What assets can Neverbell access?

Neverbell is designed to support a broad range of market assets through connected trading infrastructure. Specific availability depends on the trading venue, supported integrations, and the user's location.

Does Neverbell hold my funds?

No. Neverbell does not hold, custody, or control user funds. It is built around user-controlled access and connected execution infrastructure. Before enabling any transaction, you should review the wallet setup, permissions, and trading configuration you are using.

Can my AI agent execute trades without my approval?

Only within limits you define. Neverbell is designed around user-defined permissions and confirmation steps. You can specify what the agent is allowed to execute autonomously, what it should only prepare for your review, and what always requires your explicit confirmation.

Does Neverbell provide financial advice?

No. Neverbell is a technical skill for AI agents and does not provide financial advice, investment recommendations, or personalized guidance. Any market action is based on user instructions and user-defined parameters. Trading involves risk, and users are solely responsible for their own trading decisions.

Is trading through an AI agent risky?

Yes. All trading involves risk, including the risk of losing funds. Using an AI agent does not eliminate market risk, execution risk, technical risk, or user error. Risk management remains your responsibility. Only use funds you can afford to lose.

What is agentic finance, and where does Neverbell fit?

Agentic finance refers to workflows where AI agents take structured, permission-based actions in financial contexts — such as monitoring markets or preparing and executing trades. Neverbell is an early skill built for this space, giving AI agents the market access and trading infrastructure they need to move beyond conversation into action.

How is Neverbell different from a robo-advisor?

Neverbell is not a robo-advisor. Robo-advisors are regulated financial products that manage investments and provide portfolio advice. Neverbell is a technical skill that extends an AI agent's capabilities — it does not manage portfolios, give investment advice, or make autonomous financial decisions outside of user-defined permissions.

How do I get access to Neverbell?

During early access, users may be invited to test Neverbell through a supported onboarding process. Once approved, you will receive setup instructions, documentation, and relevant testing materials. Follow Neverbell's official channels for updates on early access and launch timing.

Is Neverbell open source?

Neverbell is being developed with an open and accessible approach. Specific repositories, documentation, and contribution paths may be shared as the project develops.

Trading involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for all investors. Leveraged trading amplifies both potential gains and losses. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Neverbell does not provide financial advice. All trades are executed via decentralized infrastructure and settled on-chain. Users are responsible for all trading decisions and outcomes. By using Neverbell you acknowledge these risks and agree to our terms of service. Neverbell is not a registered broker-dealer or investment advisor. Securities and crypto assets are not protected by SIPC or any government insurance program. Trade responsibly and never risk more than you can afford to lose.

Neverbell is a technical skill that extends an AI agent's capabilities — it does not manage portfolios, give investment advice, or make autonomous financial decisions outside of user-defined permissions.

sentences.zh: Neverbell 不是机器人顾问。

sentences.en: Robo-advisors are regulated financial products that manage investments and provide portfolio advice.
sentences.zh: 机器人顾问是受监管的金融产品，用于管理投资并提供投资组合建议。

sentences.en: Neverbell is a technical skill that extends an AI agent's capabilities — it does not manage portfolios, give investment advice, or make autonomous financial decisions outside of user-defined permissions.

blocks.html_en: During early access, users may be invited to test Neverbell through a supported onboarding process. Once approved, you will receive setup instructions, documentation, and relevant testing materials. Follow Neverbell's official channels for updates on early access and launch timing.

sentences.en: During early access, users may be invited to test Neverbell through a supported onboarding process.

sentences.en: Follow Neverbell's official channels for updates on early access and launch timing.
sentences.zh: 关注 Neverbell 的官方渠道，了解有关抢先体验和发布时间的最新信息。

blocks.html_en: Neverbell is being developed with an open and accessible approach. Specific repositories, documentation, and contribution paths may be shared as the project develops.

sentences.en: Neverbell is being developed with an open and accessible approach.

blocks.html_en: Trading involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for all investors. Leveraged trading amplifies both potential gains and losses. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Neverbell does not provide financial advice. All trades are executed via decentralized infrastructure and settled on-chain. Users are responsible for all trading decisions and outcomes. By using Neverbell you acknowledge these risks and agree to our terms of service. Neverbell is not a registered broker-dealer or investment advisor. Securities and crypto assets are not protected by SIPC or any government insurance program. Trade responsibly and never risk more than you can afford to lose.

content_html_zh:
24/7 人工智能代理交易

让您的 AI 代理 24/7 直接进入市场，利用杠杆交易股票、ETF、大宗商品和加密货币。 长款、短裤、现货。 交易任何东西。 一切都来自一次谈话。

注册即可获得 1,000 美元的测试资金

并立即开始使用 OpenClaw、Hermes、Claude Code 等进行测试。

接收来自 Neverbell 的与您的帐户相关的更新

向您的代理发送消息以进行交易、检查余额、管理头寸并了解任何资产。

请您的代理向您发送每日心跳，其中包含新闻源和您可以采取行动的职位的情绪分析。

设置您自己的个人量化人员，以创建模型、为您提供建议和报告，并自主开仓和平仓。

将您的代理连接到电话服务，以便您可以致电您的经纪人并大声执行交易。

✦

Neverbell 是一种代理技能，可以让您的 AI 代理直接进入市场。 超过 300 项资产。 具有充分杠杆的股票、ETF、大宗商品和加密货币。 你控制风险。 链接数据源、构建策略、对突发新闻做出反应、运行模型、构建完全独特的交易界面。 可能性是无限的。

观看实际操作

国会交易什么就交易什么。 在新闻周期赶上之前。

Download

谷歌“经济衰退”开始流行。 你的经纪人已经转向黄金了。

Download

油轮改道前往储存处。 你的经纪人看到了。 短裤粗糙。

Download

只要告诉它你想要什么。 它处理其余的事情。

Download

路透社突发新闻。 在您读完之前，您的作品集就会做出反应。

Download

它研究您的交易方式。 建立一个模型。 然后在你自己的游戏中击败你。

Download

常见问题

What is Neverbell?

Neverbell 是人工智能代理的一项技能，可提供直接市场准入——允许代理监控市场、解释自然语言指令，并通过连接的交易基础设施帮助准备或执行交易。 它不是一个独立的应用程序、交易平台、经纪人或财务顾问。

How does Neverbell work?

Neverbell 将受支持的人工智能代理连接到市场数据和交易执行工具。 您以自然语言提供说明，例如要关注哪些资产、何时向您发出警报或要准备哪些交易。 代理解释这些指令，检查市场状况，并在您定义的权限和限制内采取行动。 所有决定权均由用户决定。

What can I use Neverbell for?

Neverbell 使人工智能代理能够监控市场走势、跟踪特定资产、设置交易参数，并根据您的指令准备或执行支持的交易。 可用性取决于支持的代理、集成和交易场所。

Is Neverbell a trading platform or app?

不。Neverbell 是人工智能代理的一项技能，而不是独立的交易平台、消费者应用程序或经纪业务。 它旨在在受支持的人工智能代理环境中工作，使这些代理能够在您设置的限制内代表您与市场数据和交易基础设施进行交互。

Which AI agents support Neverbell?

Neverbell 是为代理环境构建的，包括 Claude Code、OpenClaw、Hermes 和其他兼容的代理框架。 随着技能的发展和更多集成的出现，支持可能会扩大。

Do I need to know how to code to use Neverbell?

了解 Neverbell 的用途不需要编码知识，但早期访问目前最适合习惯使用 AI 代理、终端或基于代理的工作流程的人们。 随着时间的推移，这种体验可能会变得更容易被更广泛的受众所接受。

What assets can Neverbell access?

Neverbell 旨在通过互联的交易基础设施支持广泛的市场资产。 具体可用性取决于交易场所、支持的集成以及用户的位置。

Does Neverbell hold my funds?

不会。Neverbell 不持有、保管或控制用户资金。 它是围绕用户控制的访问和连接的执行基础设施构建的。 在启用任何交易之前，您应该检查您正在使用的钱包设置、权限和交易配置。

Can my AI agent execute trades without my approval?

仅在您定义的范围内。 Neverbell 是围绕用户定义的权限和确认步骤而设计的。 您可以指定允许代理自主执行的内容、只应准备供您审核的内容以及始终需要您明确确认的内容。

Does Neverbell provide financial advice?

不。Neverbell 是人工智能代理的一项技术技能，不提供财务建议、投资建议或个性化指导。 任何市场行为都基于用户指令和用户定义的参数。 交易涉及风险，用户应对自己的交易决定承担全部责任。

Is trading through an AI agent risky?

是的。 所有交易都涉及风险，包括损失资金的风险。 使用人工智能代理并不能消除市场风险、执行风险、技术风险或用户错误。 风险管理仍然是您的责任。 仅使用您可以承受损失的资金。

What is agentic finance, and where does Neverbell fit?

代理金融是指人工智能代理在金融环境中采取结构化、基于许可的行动的工作流程，例如监控市场或准备和执行交易。 Neverbell 是针对该领域构建的一项早期技能，为人工智能代理提供了他们从对话到行动所需的市场准入和交易基础设施。

How is Neverbell different from a robo-advisor?

Neverbell 不是机器人顾问。 机器人顾问是受监管的金融产品，用于管理投资并提供投资组合建议。 Neverbell 是一项扩展人工智能代理能力的技术技能——它不会管理投资组合、提供投资建议或在用户定义的权限之外做出自主财务决策。

How do I get access to Neverbell?

在抢先体验期间，用户可能会被邀请通过受支持的入门流程来测试 Neverbell。 一旦获得批准，您将收到设置说明、文档和相关测试材料。 关注 Neverbell 的官方渠道，了解有关抢先体验和发布时间的最新信息。

Is Neverbell open source?

Neverbell 正在以开放且易于访问的方式进行开发。 随着项目的发展，特定的存储库、文档和贡献路径可能会被共享。

交易涉及重大损失风险，并不适合所有投资者。 杠杆交易放大了潜在的收益和损失。 过去的表现并不能保证未来的结果。 Neverbell 不提供财务建议。 所有交易均通过去中心化基础设施执行并在链上结算。 用户对所有交易决策和结果负责。 使用 Neverbell 即表示您承认这些风险并同意我们的服务条款。 Neverbell 不是注册经纪自营商或投资顾问。 证券和加密资产不受 SIPC 或任何政府保险计划的保护。 负责任地进行交易，切勿冒超出您承受能力的风险。
